message:
fix(gui): replace render_state unwrap with proper error in paint path

Two render_state.as_ref().unwrap() calls in pane.rs paint functions
would panic if rendering was triggered before OpenGL/WebGPU init
completed. Changed to .ok_or_else() returning anyhow::Error, which
the paint caller already handles gracefully.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
